description: The 'Ndrina Araniti is a historical and powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, operating in Sambatello, Reggio Calabria. According to the 'Sistema Reggio' operation, they are one of five 'ndrine with absolute monopoly over commercial and economic activities in Reggio Calabria. The clan has been involved in criminal activities for over 50 years, including extortion, kidnapping, usury, money laundering, and public contract fraud. Members have been arrested in various operations, and assets worth millions of euros have been seized.

country_links.evidence_quote: operanti in Toscana e all'estero, in particolare Slovenia e Regno Unito
country_links.context: The organization operates companies in Slovenia.
